intent: 实现3个fabric后续功能: ⑤cite重设计(recall-based自动记账) ④冲突检测(LLM判定) ③向量中文模型+install. 各按scratchpad方案文档.
goal: task_decomposition 全部 status=done(每个fix实现+deterministic验证+tsc/test绿); 依次 ⑤→④→③; 分批commit

in_scope: ⑤cite: P5方案(recall自动记账+legacy保留)
④conflict: P4方案v2一步到位LLM判定
③vector: P3方案(multilingual-e5-small+install接线), 先确认fastembed-js枚举
每功能: 实现+test+每完成commit回填git_commits[]
out_of_scope: KP-leak修复(多-store已基本解, 见fulltest F4更正)
破坏现有行为(cite/recall/hook向后兼容必保)
constraints: 向量真实模型召回测放nightly不进CI默认

execution_criteria: 依次 ⑤(C1-C3)→④(D1-D2)→③(V1-V3); depends_on 满足才动
每功能簇收口即commit并回填git_commits[]
向后兼容是硬约束: cite/recall/hook 旧行为不破
③的V1是研究task(确认fastembed-js枚举), 产出选定模型才进V2

task_decomposition.subject: ⑤cite: cite-policy-evict.cjs 改 recall-based 自动记账 — PreToolUse(Edit/Write)查本session近期fab_recall命中编辑path重叠→自动关联KB为cite; 无recall→软nudge(非gate); 不再要求回复首行
task_decomposition.done_when: hook行为test绿: recall→edit自动cite / edit无recall软提醒 / 手写首行override仍生效

task_decomposition.subject: ⑤cite: AGENTS.md(bootstrap-canonical.ts) Cite policy段重写 — 首行必写→改前先recall+系统自动记账+首行可选override; cite-line-parser保留(向后兼容)
task_decomposition.done_when: bootstrap snapshot更新+三端同步; parser legacy test绿

task_decomposition.subject: ⑤cite: doctor --cite-coverage 口径迁移(edit前有相关recall) + 三端hook同步 + 全test
task_decomposition.done_when: doctor cite-coverage新口径单测绿; tsc+全test绿

task_decomposition.subject: ④conflict: conflict-lint.ts — 同type/layer条目用bm25算相似度产候选对, 候选对走LLM-judge判真矛盾(复用冷评机制), 矛盾报error/相似报warn
task_decomposition.done_when: conflict-lint 单测(矛盾对/无关对/相似非矛盾) + LLM-judge seam可注入fake

task_decomposition.subject: ④conflict: doctor check knowledge_conflict接入 + config阈值 + i18n中英 + --lint-conflicts[--deep]
task_decomposition.done_when: doctor新check单测 + i18n齐 + tsc+全test绿

task_decomposition.subject: ③vector: 确认 fastembed-js 支持的模型枚举(multilingual-e5-small vs e5-large vs bge-small-zh) — npm view/查EmbeddingModel; 定最终pin模型(lokb验证倾向 multilingual-e5-small)
task_decomposition.done_when: 产出确认: fastembed-js实际支持的中文/多语言模型名 + 最终选定

task_decomposition.subject: ③vector: config加embed_model(pin多语言) + vector-retrieval.ts FlagEmbedding.init读config模型(替硬编码英文默认)
task_decomposition.done_when: config schema+读取单测(fake embedder); tsc绿

task_decomposition.subject: ③vector: install加可选'启用语义搜索'步骤(npm i fastembed+预热+设embed_enabled+embed_model) + reindex说明 + 幂等test
task_decomposition.done_when: install可选步骤幂等+skip路径test; tsc+全test绿
